arts.ttl: Arsenal, Liverpool suffer fatal transfer blow as six-year contract 'agreed'
arts.sum: Newcastle United's Anthony Gordon reportedly agrees a new six-year contract with the Magpies, ending speculation over his future amid interest from Arsenal and Liverpool.

CB: Gabriel - The Brazilian defender remains one of Arsenal's biggest goal threats from set-pieces and will get a chance or two against a Saints side that has conceded 12 goals in six league games. Arsenal will aim to keep pace with the Premier League's title hopefuls in their final game before the October international break against Southampton.

arts.ttl: Southampton boss Russell Martin explains what his side must do against Arsenal
arts.sum: Arsenal scored a league-high 20 goals from set-pieces last season and are joint-top again this term with three in six games. Russell Martin insists Southampton have plenty to be “excited and positive about” ahead of their Premier League clash with Arsenal at the weekend.

arts.ttl: Ray Parlour predicts result of Arsenal v Southampton clash tomorrow, says £65m player will score
arts.sum: Arsenal will look to continue on their great run of form when they host Premier League strugglers Southampton on Saturday. The Gunners remain unbeaten this...

arts.ttl: Ex-Arsenal and Chelsea star could blow transfer market wide open as 'massive' legal news confirmed
arts.sum: A former defensive midfielder who turned out for both Chelsea and Arsenal is at the centre of a regulatory storm that has the potential to...

arts.ttl: Photo: 19-year-old known for his 'crunching challenges' spotted in Arsenal training, launches into tackle on Sterling
arts.sum: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta has been putting his players through their paces ahead of Saturday’s meeting with Premier League strugglers Southampton. The Gunners will be...

arts.ttl: Arsenal sent worrying Martin Odegaard injury update by Norway manager
arts.sum: Norway manager Stale Solbakken has confessed Arsenal midfielder Martin Odegaard is "far away" from being in contention for an international call-up. Odegaard was never expected to be called up for this latest squad, but Solbakken confessed upon the revelation of his call-ups that the Arsenal midfielder was not even in his thoughts, such is the significance of his injury.

arts.ttl: FPL Gameweek 7 Scout Picks: Arsenal triple-up + Johnson
arts.sum: Our final selection ahead of Saturday’s deadline The post FPL Gameweek 7 Scout Picks: Arsenal triple-up + Johnson appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

Only Wolves’ inferior goal difference is keeping last season’s Championship play-off winners off the foot of the table as they seek their first win in the Premier League in 20 matches - their worst run in the top-flight since 1969. We are winless in our last three Premier League meetings with the Saints, drawing both games the last time we faced in 2022/23.

arts.ttl: John Barnes Urges Law Overhaul After Arsenal Tactics
arts.sum: Former Liverpoolstar John Barnes says football law "has to change" in response to Arsenal's tactics in their 2-2 draw with Manchester City.
